title: Ear infections
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Ear infections can involve the middle ear and may cause ear pain, fever, or fluid-related symptoms.
Treatment decisions may include clinician-directed pain control, observation, or antibiotics depending on the case.
Patient education should include follow-up and escalation if symptoms worsen or concerning symptoms develop.
This source supports patient education, not ED-specific risk stratification.
